configurations.name: Smart: Docs or applanch
configurations.command: $activeFile = ('${relativeFile}' -replace '\\', '/').ToLowerInvariant(); if ($activeFile.StartsWith('docs/')) { & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\Python\Python314\python.exe" -m mkdocs serve; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { dotnet run --project src/applanch/applanch.csproj; exit $LASTEXITCODE }
